sections.title: Universal Compliance Checklist and Audit Program
sections.contentHtml:
Area2026 Verification Step
FrequencyFeed License
Confirm technology vendor is named in all MLS agreements.Annual / On Change
NAR Self-CertConfirm MLS self-certified by March 1, 2026.
Once / OngoingAPI Status
Verify 100% RESO Web API; no RETS connections.Ongoing
Comp FilterConfirm all compensation data is stripped from search/display.
Daily (Automated)Attribution
Firm name + Phone/Email on all Property Detail Pages.Weekly Spot-Check
Data PurgeExpired/Withdrawn listings removed within 24 hours.
Daily (Automated)VOW Gate
Registration required; email verified before rich data access.Monthly Test
HPPA Opt-InDocumented opt-in before any mortgage lead sharing.
OngoingGPC Signal
Honor Global Privacy Control as opt-out (CA + CO).Ongoing
AVM Opt-OutRespect AutomatedValuationModelYN per property.
Per RenderAI Photo Label
MediaDigitalEnhancementYN flagged and labeled in UI.Per Render
AccessibilityWCAG 2.1 Level AA screen-reader audit.
AnnualVendor SPA
Signed CCPA Service Provider Agreements for all processors.At Onboarding
Thompson BrokerVerify non-NAR broker access rights in FL, GA, AL.
On Feed Setup 

COMPLIANCE LOG: Platforms must maintain a Compliance Log detailing every automated status purge, registration verification, and audit result. This log is essential for defending against MLS violation notices or regulatory inquiries. Respond to any MLS violation notice within 24 hours with a written remediation plan.
